{
    /// <summary>Generated by DwarfMapper — maps <c>global::Demo.S</c> to <c>global::Demo.D</c>.</summary>

    /// <item><description>X &lt;- X</description></item>

    public partial global::Demo.D Map(global::Demo.S s)
